/usr/sbin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CppAdsPrometheusConnector.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CppAdsPrometheusConnector.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CppAdsPrometheusConnector.dir/src/ProcessDataBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CppAdsPrometheusConnector.dir/src/ADSProvidor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CppAdsPrometheusConnector.dir/src/PrometheusEndpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CppAdsPrometheusConnector.dir/src/Configuration.cpp.o -o CppAdsPrometheusConnector  /usr/lib/libpistache.so /usr/local/lib/libAdsLib.a
